response.text:
## 📋 6 measurement Commands Found

## **1. MEASUrement:ADDMEAS**

**Description:** This command adds a measurement.

**Set:** `MEASUrement:ADDMEAS {ACCOMMONMODE|ACPR|ACRMS|AMPLITUDE|AREA|BASE|BITAMPLITUDE| BITHIGH|BITLOW|BURSTWIDTH|CCJITTER|COMMONMODE|CPOWER|DATARATE|DCD|DDJ|DDRAOS| DDRAOSPERTCK|DDRAOSPERUI|DDRAUS|DDRAUSPERTCK|DDRAUSPERUI|DDRHOLDDIFF|DDRSETUPDIFF| DDRTCHABS|DDRTCHAVERAGE|DDRTCKAVERAGE|DDRTCLABS|DDRTCLAVERAGE|DDRTERRMN|DDRTERRN| DDRTJITCC|DDRTJITDUTY|DDRTJITPER|DDRTPST|DDRTRPRE|DDRTWPRE|DDRVIXAC|DDRTDQSCK| DELAY|DJ|DJDIRAC|DPMPSIJ|EYEHIGH|EYELOW|FALLSLEWRATE|FALLTIME|FREQUENCY|F2|F4|F8| HEIGHT|HEIGHTBER|HIGH|HIGHTIME|HOLD|IMDAANGLE|IMDADIRECTION|IMDADQ0|IMDAEFFICIENCY| IMDAHARMONICS|IMDAMECHPWR|IMDAPOWERQUALITY|IMDASPEED|IMDASYSEFF|IMDATORQUE|ISI| JITTERSUMMARY|J2|J9|LOW|LOWTIME|MAXIMUM|MEAN|MINIMUM|NDUty|NOVERSHOOT|NPERIOD| NPJ|NWIDTH|OBW|PATTERNLENGTH|PDUTY|PERIOD|PHASE|PHASENOISE|PJ|PK2Pk|POVERSHOOT| PWIDTH|QFACTOR|RISESLEWRATE|RISETIME|RJ|RJDIRAC|RMS|SETUP|SKEW|SRJ|SSCFREQDEV| SSCMODRATE|SSCSLEWRATE|TIE|TIMEOUTSIDELEVEL|TIMETOMAX|TIMETOMIN|TJBER|TNTRATIO|TOP| UNITINTERVAL|VDIFFXOVR|WBGDDT|WBGDIODEDDT|WBGEOFF|WBGEON|WBGERR|WBGIPEAK|WBGIRRM| WBGQOSS|WBGQRR|WBGTDOFF|WBGTDON|WBGTF|WBGTON|WBGTOFF|WBGTR|WBGTRR|WBGTDT|WBGVPEAK| WIDTH|WIDTHBER}` | **Query:** `MEASUrement:ADDMEAS?`

**Type:** both | **Families:** MSO2, MSO4, MSO5, MSO6, MSO7 | **Group:** Measurement

---

## **2. MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:SOURCE**

**Description:** This command sets or queries local input source.

**Set:** `MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:SOURCE  {CH<x>|MATH<x>|REF<x>}` | **Query:** `MEASUrement:MEAS<x>:SOURCE?`

**Type:** both | **Families:** MSO2, MSO4, MSO5, MSO6, MSO7 | **Group:** Inverter Motors and Drive Analysis

---

## **3. SEARCH:SEARCH<x>:TRIGger:A:DDRREAD:STANdard**

**Description:** This command sets or queries the DDR read search standard as DDR3 or LPDDR3.

**Set:** `SEARCH:SEARCH<x>:TRIGger:A:DDRREAD:STANdard  {DDR3|LPDDR3}` | **Query:** `SEARCH:SEARCH<x>:TRIGger:A:DDRREAD:STANdard?`

**Type:** both | **Families:** MSO2, MSO4, MSO5, MSO6, MSO7 | **Group:** Search and Mark

---

## **4. SEARCH:SEARCH<x>:TRIGger:A:DDRWRITE:STANdard**

**Description:** This command sets or queries the DDR write search standard as DDR3 or LPDDR3.

**Set:** `SEARCH:SEARCH<x>:TRIGger:A:DDRWRITE:STANdard  {DDR3|LPDDR3}` | **Query:** `SEARCH:SEARCH<x>:TRIGger:A:DDRWRITE:STANdard?`

**Type:** both | **Families:** MSO2, MSO4, MSO5, MSO6, MSO7 | **Group:** Search and Mark

---

## **5. SEARCH:SEARCH<x>:TRIGger:A:DDRREADWRITE:STANdard**

**Description:** This command sets or queries the DDR read/write search standard as DDR3 or LPDDR

**Set:** `SEARCH:SEARCH<x>:TRIGger:A:DDRREADWRITE:STANdard  {DDR3|LPDDR3}` | **Query:** `SEARCH:SEARCH<x>:TRIGger:A:DDRREADWRITE:STANdard?`

**Type:** both | **Families:** MSO2, MSO4, MSO5, MSO6, MSO7 | **Group:** Search and Mark

---

## **6. HISTogram:HISTogram<x>:MEASurement:STDDev**

**Description:** This command sets or queries whether the Standard Deviation measurement is enabl

**Set:** `HISTogram:HISTogram<x>:MEASurement:STDDev  {ON|OFF}` | **Query:** `HISTogram:HISTogram<x>:MEASurement:STDDev?`

**Type:** both | **Families:** MSO2, MSO4, MSO5, MSO6, MSO7 | **Group:** Histogram
